C.description: The quantity of waste generated by each individual beaker

E.description: The highest quantity of waste permitted

X.description: Quantity of slime generated by every container

T.description: Quantity of flour utilized for each individual beaker

D.description: Quantity of flour that is accessible

V.description: Quantity of the specialized liquid utilized by individual beakers.

Z.description: Quantity of unique fluid that can be used

n.description: The number of beakers of type i used

zed.description: New variable representing the objective function

constraints.description: Constraint defining zed in terms of original variables.
constraints.formulation: zed = quicksum(X[i] * n[i] for i in range(N))

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(zed == quicksum(X[i] * n[i] for i in range(N)))

constraints.description: The combined quantity of unique liquid utilized by each beaker does not surpass Z.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(V[i] * n[i] for i in range(N)) <= Z)

constraints.description: The cumulative quantity of flour utilized by each beaker does not surpass D.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(T[i] * n[i] for i in range(N)) <= D)

constraints.description: The combined waste generated by every individual beaker does not surpass E.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(C[i] * n[i] for i in range(N)) <= E)
